english: participate; attend; take part in; counsel

etymology.description: 晶(晶) (jīng, "stars") + 光(光) (guāng, "light; brightness") + 彡(彡) (shān, "light rays") = Three Stars mansion -> depiction of brightness from stars
etymology.interpretation: The character 參(cān) originally depicted the Three Stars mansion, using components symbolizing stars, light, and light rays to create a vivid representation of brightness in the night sky.

examples.chinese: 他决定参加今天的会议(他決定參加今天的會議)。
examples.pinyin: Tā juédìng cānjiā jīntiān de huìyì.
examples.english: He decided to participate in today's meeting.

examples.chinese: 我们将参加音乐会(我們將參加音樂會)。
学生们积极参加学校的各种活动(學生們積極參加學校的各種活動)。
examples.pinyin: Xuéshēngmen jījí cānjiā xuéxiào de gè zhǒng huódòng.
examples.english: The students actively take part in various school activities.
